acceptance_required.description: Indicates if acceptance is required for VPC endpoint connections to this service.

arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the VPC endpoint service.

availability_zones.description: The availability zones where the VPC endpoint service is available.

base_endpoint_dns_names.description: The base DNS names for the VPC endpoint service.

id.description: The ID of the VPC endpoint service.

manages_vpc_endpoints.description: Indicates if the service manages its own VPC endpoints.

owner.description: The AWS account ID of the service owner.

private_dns_name.description: The private DNS name for the VPC endpoint service.

private_dns_names.description: The private DNS names for the VPC endpoint service.

service_id.description: The service ID of the VPC endpoint service.

service_name.description: The name of the VPC endpoint service.

service_type.description: The type of the VPC endpoint service (e.g., Interface, Gateway).

supported_ip_address_types.description: The IP address types supported by the VPC endpoint service.

tags.description: A map of tags assigned to the VPC endpoint service.

vpc_endpoint_policy_supported.description: Indicates if a VPC endpoint policy is supported by the service.
